scripts.sync: node scripts/apply-android-patches.mjs && npm run inject:defaults && npx cap sync android
scripts.build:debug: npm run check:java && npm run ensure:sdk && npm run sync && node scripts/gradle-build.mjs assembleDebug
scripts.build:release: npm run check:java && npm run ensure:sdk && npm run sync && node scripts/gradle-build.mjs assembleRelease
